---
title: "Sermons Preached before His Royal Highness the Prince of Wales during his tour in the East in the spring of 1862; with notices of some of the localities visited "
---

## Sermons Preached before His Royal Highness the Prince of Wales during his tour in the East in the spring of 1862; with notices of some of the localities visited 

**Author:** The Rev. Arthur Penrhyn Stanley
**Date:** 1863
**Imprint:** London: Murray

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
